creator: bsd@abinet.ru
text:
Created attachment 212993
zm patch

Bug fixes since 1.34.6

    Fix user-selected language
    Improve aspect ratio in montage
    Fix auto-selecting newly saved layout in montage
    Fix problem with triggers are null
    fix returning frameID returning score instead of frameID
    Provide a more useful error message when the monitor's function is set to NONE - fixes
    fix compile fail with mariadb-10.2.29
    fix zmu utility fail with MySQL database query error
    fix HAVE_DECL_MD5 set when build requires GnuTLS
    use CMAKE_INSTALL_FULL_DATADIR in CMakeLists.txt to fix build in other platforms.
    Add MaxScoreFrameId and AlarmFrameId to event API
    fix streaming when using an applet
    Support missing openssl_random_pseudo_bytes by using alternate functions
    fix starting and stopping zmcontrol.pl on remote servers

===========
testport@OK
